description_long: This is a single athletic shoe featuring a predominantly white upper with a red heel collar and accent, and a tan rubber sole. The upper is constructed from a combination of synthetic leather and mesh, with visible perforations on the toe box for breathability. The shoe has a standard criss-cross lacing system with white laces, and the interior lining is a soft red fabric. The outsole is textured for grip and shows signs of wear, particularly at the toe and heel. A circular white logo is visible on the red heel collar, adding a distinctive branding element. The shoe appears to be designed for casual or sports use and shows moderate signs of use, with some dirt and creasing on the upper and sole.
description: A white and red athletic shoe with a tan rubber sole, standard lacing, and visible wear, featuring a circular white logo on the heel collar.
description_view_0: Top-rear view showing the red heel collar, white laces, and circular white logo on the inner lining.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the white upper, red heel accent, and tan textured sole.
description_view_2: Angled front view displaying the toe box perforations, laces, and worn sole.
description_view_3: Top view showing the full lacing system, perforated toe box, and red interior lining.
attribute_logo: circular white logo on the red heel collar
